changeSet.author: patrick.heusser
changeSet.createView: SELECT gt.id, gt.file_id, gt.creator, gt.gpx_version, gt.meta_name, gt.meta_description, gt.meta_time, gt.meta_author, gt.track_name, gt.track_description, gt.start_date, gt.end_date, gt.median_distance_between_points, gt.avg_distance_between_points, gt.max_distance_between_points, gt.did_filter_outlier_by_distance, gt.number_of_track_points, gt.track_length_in_meter, gt.track_type, gt.utm_zone, gt.create_date, gt.load_status, gt.load_messages, gt.duplicate_status, gt.duplicate_of, gt.activity_type, gt.activity_type_source, gt.activity_type_source_details, gt.garmin_activity_id, gt.meta_link, gt.update_date, gt.duplicate_details, gt.bbox_min_lat, gt.bbox_max_lat, gt.bbox_min_lng, gt.bbox_max_lng, gt.center_lat, gt.center_lng, ixf.index AS f_index, ixf.name AS f_name, ixf.path AS f_path, ixf.base_path AS f_base_path, ixf.full_path AS f_full_path, ixf.size AS f_size, ixf.indexer_id AS f_indexer_id, ixf.last_modified_date AS f_last_modified_date, ixf.index_added_date AS f_index_added_date, ixf.index_update_date AS f_index_update_date, ixf.indexer_status AS f_indexer_status, ixf.last_message AS f_last_message, gd.id AS gd_id, gd.create_date AS gd_create_date, gd.precision_in_meter AS gd_precision_in_meter, gd.track_type AS gd_track_type, gd.track AS gd_track, gd_raw.id as gd_raw_id, gd_raw.track as gd_raw_track FROM gps_track gt LEFT JOIN gps_track_data gd ON gt.id = gd.gps_track_id AND gd.precision_in_meter = 10::numeric LEFT JOIN gps_track_data gd_raw ON gt.id = gd_raw.gps_track_id AND gd_raw.precision_in_meter = 0:: numeric and gd_raw.track_type='RAW' LEFT JOIN indexed_file ixf ON ixf.id = gt.file_id

column.name: description
column.value: Filters the tracks by two given dates, a start and an end date. The filter can also be used to filter tracks for a certain year.

insert.column: SELECT id, activity_type AS grp FROM gps_track gt WHERE 1 = 1 -- OPTIONAL DATE_FROM and DATE_TO params. If NULL, they won't be applied as COALESCE uses start_date as fallback. AND gt.start_date >= COALESCE(TO_TIMESTAMP(:DATE_TIME_FROM, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), gt.start_date) AND gt.start_date <= COALESCE(TO_TIMESTAMP(:DATE_TIME_TO, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), gt.start_date) AND gt.start_date >= '1971-01-01' AND gt.duplicate_status = 'UNIQUE' AND gt.load_status = 'SUCCESS' ORDER BY start_date

column.name: description
column.value: Filters the tracks by year. If multiple years are given then the year will be optionally used for coloring.

insert.column: select id, to_char(gt.start_date, 'YYYY') as grp from gps_track gt where 1 = 1 -- have an optional YEAR_FROM and YEAR_TO param. and gt.start_date >= COALESCE(TO_TIMESTAMP(:YEAR_FROM || '-01-01', 'YYYY-MM-DD'), gt.start_date) and gt.start_date <= COALESCE(TO_TIMESTAMP(:YEAR_TO || '-12-31', 'YYYY-MM-DD'), gt.start_date) and gt.start_date >= '1971-01-01' and gt.duplicate_status = 'UNIQUE' and gt.load_status = 'SUCCESS' order by start_date

column.name: description
column.value: Filter for tracks which have a certain word in their name or description.

insert.column: SELECT id, activity_type as grp FROM gps_track gt WHERE ( meta_name ILIKE '%' || :SEARCH_WORD || '%' OR meta_description ILIKE '%' || :SEARCH_WORD || '%' OR track_name ILIKE '%' || :SEARCH_WORD || '%' OR track_description ILIKE '%' || :SEARCH_WORD || '%' ) -- include the standard query filter with the condition below AND id = ANY( select id from ( [[~{/GPS_TRACK/SmartBaseFilter}]] )) ORDER BY start_date

column.name: description
column.value: Gets activities into main categories: Walking, Biking and Motorized ones.

insert.column: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT id, CASE WHEN (activity_type IS NOT NULL AND activity_type IN ('CAR', 'MOTORBIKING', 'AIRPLANE', 'SUPER_SONIC')) THEN 'MOTORIZED' WHEN (activity_type IS NOT NULL AND activity_type IN ('BICYCLE', 'MOUNTAIN_BIKING')) THEN 'CYCLING' WHEN (activity_type IS NOT NULL AND activity_type IN ('WALKING', 'HIKING', 'RUNNING')) THEN 'ON_FOOT' WHEN (activity_type IS NOT NULL AND activity_type IN ('STAND_UP_PADDLE', 'ROWING', 'KAYAKING')) THEN 'ON_WATER' ELSE NULL END AS grp FROM gps_track gt WHERE 1=1 -- include the standard query filter with the condition below AND id = ANY(SELECT id FROM ( [[~{/GPS_TRACK/SmartBaseFilter}]] )) ORDER BY start_date ) subquery WHERE grp IS NOT NULL

column.name: description
column.value: Filter only for tracks which are non-motorized (human powered).

insert.column: select id, activity_type as grp from gps_track gt where 1=1 and (activity_type is not null and activity_type not in ('CAR', 'MOTORBIKING', 'AIRPLANE' )) and not (CONCAT_WS(' ', track_name, track_description, meta_name, meta_description) ~ '\yRV\y') -- include the standard query filter with the condition below and id = ANY( select id from ( [[~{/GPS_TRACK/SmartBaseFilter}]] )) order by start_date

column.name: description
column.value: Filter only for tracks which are motorized (not human powered).

insert.column: select id, activity_type as grp from gps_track gt where 1=1 and ( (activity_type is not null and activity_type in ('CAR', 'MOTORBIKING', 'AIRPLANE', 'SUPER_SONIC' )) or (CONCAT_WS(' ', track_name, track_description, meta_name, meta_description) ~ '\yRV\y') ) -- include the standard query filter with the condition below and id = ANY( select id from ( [[~{/GPS_TRACK/SmartBaseFilter}]] )) order by start_date

column.name: description
column.value: Shows tracks which have some sort of a suspicious data. This can indicate data problems, e.g. originating from old GPS devices or bad satellite reception at the time of recording.

insert.column: select id, activity_type as grp from gps_track gt where 1=0 or (start_date is not null and start_date < '1970-02-01') -- suspicious as GPS did not exist back then or (meta_time is not null and meta_time < '1970-02-01') -- suspicious as GPS did not exist back then or (activity_type like '%SUPER_SONIC%') -- almost nothing is that fast or (max_distance_between_points > 1000)

column.name: description
column.value: Tracks which have been identified to be duplicates

insert.column: select id, activity_type as grp from gps_track gt where duplicate_status != 'UNIQUE'
select id, activity_type as grp from gps_track gt where load_status != 'SUCCESS'

update.column: select id, activity_type as grp from gps_track gt where 1=1 and (activity_type is not null and activity_type not in ('CAR', 'MOTORBIKING', 'AIRPLANE' )) and not (CONCAT_WS(' ', track_name, track_description, meta_name, meta_description) ~ '\yRV\y') -- include the standard query filter with the condition below and id = ANY( select id from ( [[~{/GPS_TRACK/SmartBaseFilter}]] )) order by start_date

select id, activity_type as grp from gps_track gt where 1=1 and ( (activity_type is not null and activity_type in ('CAR', 'MOTORBIKING', 'AIRPLANE', 'SUPER_SONIC' )) or (CONCAT_WS(' ', track_name, track_description, meta_name, meta_description) ~ '\yRV\y') ) -- include the standard query filter with the condition below and id = ANY( select id from ( [[~{/GPS_TRACK/SmartBaseFilter}]] )) order by start_date
